arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to end their winless run in the Premier League against Brentford

arts.ttl: Manchester United are vulnerable to the tactic taking the Premier League by storm
arts.sum: Brentford have made some sensational starts to Premier League games this season and at Old Trafford they have the chance to expose slow starters.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag has been given green light to unleash his first-choice Manchester United attack
arts.sum: Man United manager Erik ten Hag will be desperate to oversee a positive result and performance when Brentford visit Old Trafford on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag is about to start opinion-splitting player Manchester United were desperate to sell
arts.sum: Man Utd play Brentford in the Premier League on Saturday and Victor Lindelof is likely to start at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag replacement breaks silence as Jim Ratcliffe sent warning
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is still under pressure of the sack with the Dutchman needing to turn Manchester United's awful form around if he is to keep his job at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag without Man Utd's secret weapon for must-win clash with Brentford
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag survived a crucial home meeting with Brentford in October 2023 but the Manchester United manager will need to find himself a new hero this time around

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford makes England feelings clear after being frozen out of Three Lions setup
arts.sum: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford has 60 England caps to his name but the forward has not featured in a Three Lions squad in months and has not scored for over a year

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank provides Yoane Wissa injury update ahead of Brentford's clash with Man United
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank provides an update on Yoane Wissa's injury recovery ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Fixtures vs form: Are Man Utd ‘flat track bullies’?
arts.sum: United have some excellent fixtures coming up - can it kickstart some form? The post Fixtures vs form: Are Man Utd ‘flat track bullies’? appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm extent of Kobbie Mainoo injury blow
arts.sum: Ahead of facing Brentford in the Premier League on Saturday, United have confirmed that Mainoo will be sidelined for "a few weeks" with a muscle injury. Mainoo has started every Premier League game for United so far this season, underlining his importance to the team following his breakthrough last November and meteoric rise.
